title: Principal Platform Architect
description: Quantum Cloud is a Series C infrastructure startup building the next-generation cloud platform. As Principal Architect, you'll shape the technical vision for a platform that will compete with AWS and GCP in specific verticals. This is a rare opportunity to build from first principles with unlimited resources and a world-class team.
responsibilities: Define 3-year technical roadmap for the Quantum Cloud platform
Own architecture for multi-tenant infrastructure serving 1000+ enterprise clients
Lead a guild of 15 senior/staff engineers across 4 product squads
Represent engineering at board-level strategy discussions
